concerns.text: T015b instructs to generate synthetic images using 'Pillow compositing (random shapes/colors)' but fails to specify the concrete algorithm or parameters required to satisfy Constitution Principle VII (Ecological Sampling Integrity). The task does not define how to generate 'lighting_condition', 'room_type', or 'demographic_group' metadata, nor how to ensure the images reflect 'typical home office conditions' rather than abstract noise. An implementer cannot deterministically execute this to meet the ecological validity requirement without these specific generation rules.

T042 states 'Implement alternative binning strategies... to re-calculate correlations' but does not explicitly mandate iterating over all 6 predictor-outcome pairs (3 metrics × 2 outcomes) as required by FR-010. The task description is ambiguous on whether it covers the full matrix or just a subset, risking incomplete coverage of the functional requirement. The deliverable (T043) is also described vaguely as 'binning_results.csv' without explicitly listing the required columns (binning_strategy, predictor, outcome, pearson_r, p_value) in the task description itself, forcing the implementer to guess the schema.

T031 instructs to 'Implement Pearson correlation and linear regression' but fails to explicitly describe the logic for integrating the PCA component (generated in T033) into the regression model when VIF >= 5. While T034b handles the 'execution' of PCA regression, T031's description of the primary regression implementation lacks the conditional logic required to switch predictors based on the VIF check, creating a gap in the implementation instructions for the collinear case mandated by FR-012.

T037a hardcodes a specific citation (Wilkinson et al.) in the task description without instructing the implementer to verify this citation against the project's Reference-Validator or Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy). The task assumes the citation is valid without providing a mechanism to confirm it, which is a procedural gap in the task definition for a research project.

T015a instructs to 'simulate' a download failure using 'known non-existent placeholder IDs' but does not explicitly require an initial attempt to query real HuggingFace/OpenML endpoints to verify the absence of linked data before falling back to simulation. This creates ambiguity on whether the 'Real Dataset Path' logic is actually implemented or if the task skips straight to the fallback, potentially violating the 'OR generate synthetic data... if no linked public dataset exists' condition in FR-001.
